title: echinolobium humile
intro: Echinolobium humile, also known as the dwarf catechu or dwarf catechu tree, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Echinolobium humile include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, extract, or powder, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health conditions.
